languages.text: "Вы не понимаете. Я — {name} фон Валанциус, и это — мой дворец. Вы обязаны меня пропустить".

traits.locale_text: [Драфт]заявить, что это ваш дворец, вас надо пропустить

languages.text: "You do not understand. I am {name} von Valancius, and this is my palace. You are obliged to let me pass."
languages.original_text: "Вы не понимаете. Я — {name} фон Валанциус, и это — мой дворец. Вы обязаны меня пропустить".

traits.locale_text: "You do not understand. I am {name} von Valancius, and this is my palace. You are obliged to let me pass."
"You do not understand. I am {name} von Valancius, and this is my palace. You are obliged to let me pass."
"You do not understand. I am {name} von Valancius, and this is my palace. You are obliged to let me pass."

languages.text: “你还没弄明白。我是{name}·冯·瓦兰修斯，这是我的宫殿。你们理应放我通行。”
languages.original_text: "You do not understand. I am {name} von Valancius, and this is my palace. You are obliged to let me pass."

traits.locale_text: “你还没弄明白。我是{name}·冯·瓦兰修斯，这是我的宫殿。你们理应放我通行。”

languages.text: « Vous ne comprenez pas. Je suis {name} von Valancius et ce palais m'appartient. Vous êtes dans l'obligation de me laisser passer. »
languages.original_text: "You do not understand. I am {name} von Valancius, and this is my palace. You are obliged to let me pass."

traits.locale_text: « Vous ne comprenez pas. Je suis {name} von Valancius et ce palais m'appartient. Vous êtes dans l'obligation de me laisser passer. »

languages.text: "Anlamıyorsun. Ben {name} von Valancius'um. Burası benim sarayım. Geçmeme izin vermek zorundasın."
languages.original_text: "You do not understand. I am {name} von Valancius, and this is my palace. You are obliged to let me pass."

traits.locale_text: "Anlamıyorsun. Ben {name} von Valancius'um. Burası benim sarayım. Geçmeme izin vermek zorundasın."

languages.text: «No lo entiende, soy {name} von Valancius y este es mi palacio. Tiene que dejarme pasar».
languages.original_text: "You do not understand. I am {name} von Valancius, and this is my palace. You are obliged to let me pass."

traits.locale_text: «No lo entiende, soy {name} von Valancius y este es mi palacio. Tiene que dejarme pasar».

languages.text: "Ihr versteht nicht. Ich bin {name} von Valancius, und das ist mein Palast. Ihr müsst mich passieren lassen."
languages.original_text: "You do not understand. I am {name} von Valancius, and this is my palace. You are obliged to let me pass."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr versteht nicht. Ich bin {name} von Valancius, und das ist mein Palast. Ihr müsst mich passieren lassen."

languages.text: 「あなたは理解していない。私はヴァランシウス家の{name}であり、ここは私の宮殿だ。あなたは私を通す義務がある。」
languages.original_text: "You do not understand. I am {name} von Valancius, and this is my palace. You are obliged to let me pass."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたは理解していない。私はヴァランシウス家の{name}であり、ここは私の宮殿だ。あなたは私を通す義務がある。」
